patches.find: Do not create domains or features until `foundation/problem/problem.md`, `foundation/vision/vision.md`, and `foundation/strategy/strategy.md` contain product-specific content.
patches.replace: For `existing-product`, approve `foundation/product-baseline.md` from repository and operational evidence, then approve `foundation/strategy/strategy.md` before creating delivery work.

For `existing-product`, complete and individually approve `product-baseline.md`, then `strategy/strategy.md`. Escalate to the full Foundation path when audience, delivered value, or product direction is uncertain.
